name: Creamy Mocha Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together cocoa and icing sugar in a large bowl until well blended. There should be no lumps.
2. Melt butter over medium heat.
3. Add coffee and beat with an electric mixer until smooth.
4. Fold in pecans.
5. Turn mixture into wax paper-lined loaf pan.
6. Smooth the top with a knife dipped in warm water.
7. Refrigerate until set.
8. When set, turn out onto a cutting board and cut into squares.
